title: Poland’s Azoty Seeks 83% Debt Writedown in Polymer Restructuring
description: Grupa Azoty SA seeks to settle just about 17% of debt taken to build the biggest propylene and polypropylene complex in central and eastern Europe.
content: Grupa Azoty SA seeks to settle just about 17% of debt taken to build the biggest propylene and polypropylene complex in central and eastern Europe.
